---
title: "Kubernetes — Container Orchestration at Scale"
description: "Orchestrating Docker containers for production bioinformatics and ML platforms."
toc-depth: 2
---

::: {.callout-important}
**Status: Coming soon** — Learn [Docker](docker.qmd) and [Nextflow](nextflow.qmd) first.
:::

## 1. Introduction

**Kubernetes (K8s)** orchestrates containers across clusters — used when Docker alone is not enough for large-scale production deployments.

[Back to home](index.qmd)
